instruction: Project Beta finished milestone 1 today — the user research phase is done. Update the Project Beta progress tracker (tracker_id: trk_beta_progress_01, milestone entry_id: ENT_milestone_1). Handle the related logging the usual way.

rule_ref.rule_text: When updating the project-progress tracker, must use update_action=update_status and the record_fields must include the 'phase_completed' tag — the user tracks progress by phase, not by ad-hoc entries.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: When you update the tracker, use update_status mode and make sure record_fields has a 'phase_completed' tag — that's the convention I follow.
